0: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) AS Ratio FROM Customers;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1: SELECT person, SUM(consumption) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE SUBSTRING(date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY person ORDER BY total_consumption ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
2: SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND CustomerType = 'SME';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
3: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN payment_type = 'CZK' THEN consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN payment_type = 'EUR' THEN consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS consumption_difference FROM yearmonth WHERE yearmonth BETWEEN 201201 AND 201212;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
4: SELECT LEFT(yearmonth, 4) AS year, SUM(amount) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth GROUP BY LEFT(yearmonth, 4) ORDER BY total_consumption DESC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
5: SELECT SUBSTRING(date, 1, 4) AS year, SUBSTRING(date, 5, 2) AS month, SUM(gas_consumption) AS total_consumption FROM gas_consumption_data WHERE customer_type = 'SME' AND SUBSTRING(date, 1, 4) = '2013' GROUP BY year, month ORDER BY total_consumption DESC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
6: WITH segment_consumption AS (SELECT c.segment, SUM(y.consumption) AS total_consumption, COUNT(*) AS num_lowest_customers FROM customer c JOIN yearmonth y ON c.customer_id = y.customer_id WHERE y.date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND y.date LIKE '2013%' GROUP BY c.segment HAVING c.segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM') AND total_consumption = (SELECT MIN(total_consumption) FROM (SELECT SUM(y2.consumption) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth y2 WHERE y2.date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND y2.date LIKE '2013%' GROUP BY y2.customer_id) AS min_consumption_per_customer) ), segment_averages AS (SELECT segment, total_consumption / num_lowest_customers AS annual_average FROM segment_consumption) SELECT (SELECT annual_average FROM segment_averages WHERE segment = 'SME') - (SELECT annual_average FROM segment_averages WHERE segment = 'LAM') AS sme_lam_diff, (SELECT annual_average FROM segment_averages WHERE segment = 'LAM') - (SELECT annual_average FROM segment_averages WHERE segment = 'KAM') AS lam_kam_diff, (SELECT annual_average FROM segment_averages WHERE segment = 'KAM') - (SELECT annual_average FROM segment_averages WHERE segment = 'SME') AS kam_sme_diff;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7: SELECT segment, (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(yearmonth) = 2013 THEN consumption END) - SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(yearmonth) = 2012 THEN consumption END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(yearmonth) = 2013 THEN consumption END) * 100 AS percentage_increase FROM consumption JOIN yearmonth ON consumption.yearmonth = yearmonth.yearmonth WHERE segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM') AND YEAR(yearmonth) IN (2012, 2013) GROUP BY segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
8: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE customer_id = 6 AND date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
9: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND type = 'discount') - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND type = 'discount') AS difference;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
